权谋+高智商+单女主
重生2002，楚风云带着二十年的记忆踏入官场。
谁都以为他是个新人，却不知他手持未来的答案。
贪腐的蛀虫、盘踞的黑恶、重大的危机……都成了他青云直上的阶梯。
这是一场从基层到巅峰的终极奋斗，这是一次用权力实现理想的壮阔征程。

8371595480351550","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"目前更新的已全部看完，从头到尾看下来，在我看来写的真的不错，其实我先不管它写的真是不真实，这是小说，让我感受最深的一点就是，能让我一直看下去，不会有什么乱七八糟的剧情，这个评分感觉还是有点低了，看过这么多官场小说以来，至少能排进前二，也可以说是第一，一开始看的七点多分，本来以为内容写的不怎么样，幸亏当初坚持下来了，不然就错过这么好的一本书了，作者加油！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769136368,"group_id":"7559091993431772222","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwjziW4nlUQdIyL57NNXXmQ=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1dbbe04dfbf1440f8ce78507cd147021~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776709903&x-signature=w6dT95S2xa41og7Tx0PIoSVrnf0%3D","user_id":"644735751698397","user_name":"耐摔的冰红茶"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"644735751698397","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7559091993431772222","book_info":{"abstract":"[官场爽文，两次荣登重生阅读榜前二十次以及都市阅读榜前二十]
